content: We can refactor 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems to embed intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) directly into long-term memory retrieval gating, where curious exploration of unlabeled data becomes a memory-prioritized signal rather than a separate reward computation. This means an agent will proactively prioritize retrieving and acting on unlabeled memory traces that it has not yet resolved, rather than just weighting memory by task relevance or recency.
